'''dakungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuoloid|vacuoloid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuoloid|vacuoloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dakungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækingith|dækingith]] || [[word:dækingij|dækingij]] || [[word:dækingish|dækingish]] || [[word:dækingi|dækingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakukunguth|dakukunguth]] || [[word:dakukunguj|dakukunguj]] || [[word:dakukungush|dakukungush]] || [[word:dakukungu|dakukungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakunguth|dakunguth]] || [[word:dakunguj|dakunguj]] || [[word:dakungush|dakungush]] || [[word:dakungu|dakungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakufnguth|dakufnguth]] || [[word:dakufnguj|dakufnguj]] || [[word:dakufngush|dakufngush]] || [[word:dakufnguf|dakufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakunguthu|dakunguthu]] || [[word:dakunguju|dakunguju]] || [[word:dakungushu|dakungushu]] || [[word:dakunguku|dakunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakunguth|dakunguth]] || [[word:dakunguj|dakunguj]] || [[word:dakungush|dakungush]] || [[word:dakungu|dakungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakunguthul|dakunguthul]] || [[word:dakungujul|dakungujul]] || [[word:dakungushul|dakungushul]] || [[word:dakungukul|dakungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakunguthuthu|dakunguthuthu]] || [[word:dakungujuju|dakungujuju]] || [[word:dakungushushu|dakungushushu]] || [[word:dakunguku|dakunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakunguthun|dakunguthun]] || [[word:dakungujun|dakungujun]] || [[word:dakungushun|dakungushun]] || [[word:dakungukun|dakungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakunguthuoro|dakunguthuoro]] || [[word:dakungujuoro|dakungujuoro]] || [[word:dakungushuoro|dakungushuoro]] || [[word:dakungukuoro|dakungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
